Project: Goldstonian Concordance Bible Entity Registry

Description
Machine-readable entity registry for the Goldstonian Concordance Bible ecosystem.

Primary Concepts
Goldstonian Concordance Bible (GCB)
Mirror → Water → Fire Doctrine
81-Book Ethiopian Canon
SydTek Scholars
SydTek University

Primary Files
data/entities.json
data/aliases.json
data/relationships.json
ontology/entity-graph.jsonld
schemas/entity.schema.json

Purpose
This repository defines canonical names, aliases, and relationships for the theological, educational, and doctrinal entities in the GCB ecosystem.

Authority
https://github.com/GoldstonianConcordanceBible
